videos.headline: Aggies's 92-yard TD is the big blow in win over Razorbacks
videos.description: Austin Allen throws for 371 yards and two touchdowns, including a 92-yard TD pass to Josh Reynolds, en route to Texas A&M's 45-24 win over Arkansas.

videos.headline: Fumble on punt sets up Arkansas in Texas A&M territory
videos.description: Toby Baker punt for 39 yds , Christian Kirk returns for a loss of 14 yards to the TexAM 16 Christian Kirk fumbled, forced by Santos Ramirez, recovered by Ark

videos.headline: Arkansas strikes first with 15-yard TD to Hatcher
videos.description: After Texas A&M fumbles away a punt, Arkansas makes them pay with Austin Allen finding Keon Hatcher open in the end zone for the 15-yard score to put the Razorbacks up 7-0.

videos.headline: Texas A&M recovers botched handoff fumble
videos.description: Dominique Reed run for a loss of 6 yards to the TexAM 49 Dominique Reed fumbled, recovered by TexAM Myles Garrett

videos.headline: Knight goes 42-yards on his own to tie game for A&M
videos.description: Trevor Knight keeps the ball and finds a gapping hole to go 42 yards into the end zone and tie the game for Texas A&M at 7-7 with Arkansas.

videos.headline: R. Williams III run for 55 yds for a 1ST down

videos.description: De'Andre Coley is ejected for targeting after review

videos.headline: R. Williams III run for 8 yds for a TD
videos.description: Rawleigh Williams III run for 8 yds for a TD

videos.headline: Ricky Seals-Jones injured on Knight run
videos.description: Texas A&M WR Ricky Seals-Jones had to be helped off the field after Trevor Knight fell into him on a short run

videos.headline: Knight busts another long run for an A&M TD
videos.description: Already with a 42 -yard TD run, Trevor Knight keeps the ball again and goes 48 yards this time to pay dirt to tie the game for Texas A&M at 17-17.

videos.headline: Texas A&M fumbles at goal line
videos.description: Trevor Knight run for a loss of 3 yards to the Ark 5 Trevor Knight fumbled, recovered by Ark Dre Greenlaw

videos.headline: Myles Garrett injured on low block
videos.description: Texas A&M DE Myles Garrett injured after a low block from Arkansas

videos.headline: A&M stuffs Arkansas at the goal line again
videos.description: After forcing a fumble at the goal line earlier in the game, Texas A&M keeps Arkansas out again, this time on fourth down to keep the game tied at 17-17.

videos.headline: Texas A&M goes 92 yards in the blink of an eye
videos.description: After stuffing Arkansas at the goal line to force a turnover on downs, two plays later Texas A&M goes 92 yards the other way when Trevor Knight hits Josh Reynolds for the go-ahead Aggies touchdown.

videos.headline: Another big play results in another Texas A&M TD
videos.description: Texas A&M strikes again, this time Trayveon Williams takes the handoff and goes 33 yards to the house to increase the Aggies' lead over Arkansas to 31-17.
